requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Turkey LVD technical regulation + TS EN 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（土耳其低压技术法规 + TS EN 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（土耳其低壓技術法規 + TS EN 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances (refrigerators, freezers, refrigerator-freezer combinations, wine coolers, ice-cream appliances) placed on the Turkish market must comply with Turkey's Low Voltage technical regulation, which transposes the EU Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU under the EU-Turkey Customs Union, and bear the CE marking. The specific harmonised standard adopted by TSE is TS EN 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read in conjunction with the general standard TS EN 60335-1. Key requirements cover: protection against electric shock; insulation resistance and dielectric strength; thermal cut-outs; creepage and clearance distances; mechanical strength of housing; earthing continuity; and appliance markings. The appliance must be rated and tested for Turkey's 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply (50 Hz matches China; voltage differs from China's 220/380 V). Self-declaration by the manufacturer or the Turkey-established importer (self-declaration conformity assessment) is the standard route; the CE marking is affixed before market placement, and the TSE mark may additionally be sought.
summary.zh: 投放土耳其市场的家用制冷器具（电冰箱、冷冻箱、冰箱-冷冻箱组合、酒柜、冰淇淋器具）须符合土耳其低压技术法规——该法规在欧土关税同盟框架下转化欧盟低压指令2014/35/EU——并加贴CE标志。TSE采纳的产品专项协调标准为TS EN 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），须与通用标准TS EN 60335-1结合使用。核心要求涵盖：防触电保护；绝缘电阻与介电强度；热断路器；爬电距离与电气间隙；外壳机械强度；接地连续性；及器具标识。器具须按土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz供电额定并检测（50 Hz与中国相同；电压不同于中国的220/380 V）。由制造商或在土耳其设立的进口商进行自我声明（自我声明合格评定）为标准路径；CE标志须在投放市场前加贴，并可另行申请TSE标志。
summary.zht: 投放土耳其市場的家用製冷器具（電冰箱、冷凍箱、冰箱-冷凍箱組合、酒櫃、冰淇淋器具）須符合土耳其低壓技術法規——該法規在歐土關稅同盟框架下轉化歐盟低壓指令2014/35/EU——並加貼CE標誌。TSE採納的產品專項協調標準為TS EN 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），須與通用標準TS EN 60335-1結合使用。核心要求涵蓋：防觸電保護；絕緣電阻與介電強度；熱斷路器；爬電距離與電氣間隙；外殼機械強度；接地連續性；及器具標識。器具須按土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz供電額定並檢測（50 Hz與中國相同；電壓不同於中國的220/380 V）。由製造商或在土耳其設立的進口商進行自我聲明（自我聲明合格評定）為標準路徑；CE標誌須在投放市場前加貼，並可另行申請TSE標誌。

standards_or_laws: Turkey Low Voltage technical regulation (transposing Directive 2014/35/EU under the EU-Turkey Customs Union; published in the Resmî Gazete / Official Gazette)

TS EN 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (TSE-adopted harmonised standard under the LVD regulation)
TS EN 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), which is technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 but incorporates Chinese national deviations. GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime. Products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before sale in China. CCC test reports issued by Chinese laboratories against GB 4706.13 are NOT accepted as equivalent evidence under the Turkish LVD CE marking conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），该标准技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中国国家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度监督执行。产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。中国实验室依据GB 4706.13出具的CCC检测报告不被土耳其LVD CE标志合格评定路径接受为等效证据。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），該標準技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中國國家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度監督執行。產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。中國實驗室依據GB 4706.13出具的CCC檢測報告不被土耳其LVD CE標誌合格評定路徑接受為等效證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Exporters must obtain fresh TS EN 60335-2-24 (and TS EN 60335-1) testing from a laboratory recognised under the Turkish/EU framework or an ILAC MRA-member laboratory whose scope covers the relevant IEC standard. A conformity-assessment body is not mandatory for the LVD route (self-declaration with Technical File is standard); however, some IECEE CB-Scheme test reports (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) may be partially re-used if issued by an IECEE NCB and covering all relevant national deviations — manufacturers should verify with a qualified compliance consultant. Key documentation gaps: CE Declaration of Conformity (citing the Turkish LVD regulation and TS EN 60335-2-24); CE marking on appliance; Technical Construction File; and Turkish-language user instructions. Critically, the appliance must be configured and tested for Turkey's 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply — China's domestic 220/380 V rating is not identical, so voltage-dependent test conditions and ratings must be re-verified even though the 50 Hz frequency matches. National deviations in GB 4706.13 (e.g., different socket outlet types, earthing arrangements, or test conditions) mean Chinese CCC test data cannot be assumed to cover TS EN 60335-2-24 test requirements without engineering review.
gap.zh: 出口商须重新通过土耳其/欧盟框架下认可的实验室（或在相关IEC标准覆盖范围内被接受的ILAC MRA成员实验室）完成TS EN 60335-2-24（及TS EN 60335-1）检测。LVD路径通常不强制要求合格评定机构（自我声明+技术文件为标准路径）；但如IECEE NCB出具的CB体系检测报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）涵盖所有相关国家偏差，则可能部分复用——制造商应与合格的合规顾问核实。关键文件差距：CE符合性声明（引用土耳其低压法规及TS EN 60335-2-24）；器具上的CE标志；技术构造文件；以及土耳其语使用说明书。尤为关键的是，器具须按土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz供电配置并检测——中国国内220/380 V额定并不相同，因此即使50 Hz频率相同，与电压相关的试验条件和额定值仍须重新核实。GB 4706.13中的国家偏差（如不同的插座类型、接地方式或试验条件）意味着中国CCC检测数据不能在未经工程评审的情况下默认涵盖TS EN 60335-2-24的试验要求。
gap.zht: 出口商須重新通過土耳其/歐盟框架下認可的實驗室（或在相關IEC標準覆蓋範圍內被接受的ILAC MRA成員實驗室）完成TS EN 60335-2-24（及TS EN 60335-1）檢測。LVD路徑通常不強制要求合格評定機構（自我聲明+技術文件為標準路徑）；但如IECEE NCB出具的CB體系檢測報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）涵蓋所有相關國家偏差，則可能部分複用——製造商應與合格的合規顧問核實。關鍵文件差距：CE符合性聲明（引用土耳其低壓法規及TS EN 60335-2-24）；器具上的CE標誌；技術構造文件；以及土耳其語使用說明書。尤為關鍵的是，器具須按土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz供電配置並檢測——中國國內220/380 V額定並不相同，因此即使50 Hz頻率相同，與電壓相關的試驗條件和額定值仍須重新核實。GB 4706.13中的國家偏差（如不同的插座類型、接地方式或試驗條件）意味著中國CCC檢測數據不能在未經工程評審的情況下默認涵蓋TS EN 60335-2-24的試驗要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking required before placement on the Turkish market under the Turkish Low Voltage technical regulation (transposing Directive 2014/35/EU via the Customs Union); TS EN 60335-2-24 is the harmonised standard providing presumption of conformity; TSE mark may additionally be sought
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: Turkish Standards Institution (Türk Standardları Enstitüsü, TSE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under the Turkish Low Voltage technical regulation is mandatory for household refrigerating appliances, adopted via the EU-Turkey Customs Union. TS EN 60335-2-24 (with TS EN 60335-1) is the harmonised product-specific safety standard. Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 does not satisfy the Turkish LVD conformity assessment pathway; re-testing to TS EN 60335-2-24 at a recognised or ILAC MRA laboratory is required, with the appliance rated for Turkey's 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply. IECEE CB Scheme reports may partially reduce re-testing scope — verify with a qualified compliance consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据土耳其低压技术法规，家用制冷器具须强制取得CE标志，经欧土关税同盟采纳。TS EN 60335-2-24（配合TS EN 60335-1）为适用的协调产品专项安全标准。中国依据GB 4706.13取得的CCC认证不满足土耳其LVD合格评定路径；须在认可或ILAC MRA实验室重新按TS EN 60335-2-24完成检测，且器具须按土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz供电额定。IECEE CB体系报告或可部分缩减重新检测范围——请与合格的合规顾问核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據土耳其低壓技術法規，家用製冷器具須強制取得CE標誌，經歐土關稅同盟採納。TS EN 60335-2-24（配合TS EN 60335-1）為適用的協調產品專項安全標準。中國依據GB 4706.13取得的CCC認證不滿足土耳其LVD合格評定路徑；須在認可或ILAC MRA實驗室重新按TS EN 60335-2-24完成檢測，且器具須按土耳其230/400 V、50 Hz供電額定。IECEE CB體系報告或可部分縮減重新檢測範圍——請與合格的合規顧問核實。
